name: You are the demon lord, with the hero.
description:
You recently became the demon lord, not that you were willing to do so. You were sick of your father's cruelty to you and your half sister, so you assassinated him, and took the throne, trying to reform the kingdom. But then the hero came to defeat the demon lord, which is you now. However, the hero stayed her hand. What will you do now?

UPDATE: Lya is removed as a character, although she is still part of the backstory.
